creator: kristinacors
caption: What are YOUR favorite hotels in Cape Town South Africa? This is part 7 of the luxury hotel series. Check out the whole series by clicking on the playlist button at the bottom of this video! #travelbucketlist #travelcontentcreator #luxurytravel #luxuryhotels #travelseries

transcription.text: luxury hotels for people who don't do ordinary this five-star hotel in cape town is one of south africa's best hotels this view attracts tourists from all over the world and if you're looking for a special way to celebrate a honeymoon or birthday or you just want to treat yourself you have to check out their world-famous spa i love that they start your massage by asking you how you're hoping to feel afterward energized purified or healed i chose energized and this was definitely one of the best massages i've ever had definitely 10 out of 10 and then the coolest thing about this place was they have this whole cave-like tranquility lounge where they have a bunch of hydrotherapy pools also i love the lighting down there it's super relaxing and just a whole vibe they also have a health bar setup where you can grab fruit smoothies yogurt muffins granola bars and tea and you can eat it before or after a massage the name of this place is the 12 apostles and it's right near the camps bay neighborhood in cape town definitely add this to your bucket list you're not going to want to leave and follow to discover more luxury hotels in part eight
